title: thymus serpyllum var. pulcherrimus
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. pulcherrimus, commonly known as creeping thyme or wild thyme, is a low-growing, spreading evergreen perennial herb native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum var. pulcherrimus include relief from coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote better sleep. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
